title: tagetes moorei
intro: Tagetes moorei, also known as Mexican marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes moorei include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is also used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
